faqs.question: How do I know which GrowWise program is right for my child before committing to anything?
faqs.answer: The free assessment is the right starting point. GrowWise evaluates your child's current level and recommends the most appropriate program and format — small group or one-on-one, in-person or online. There is no commitment required to complete the assessment.

faqs.question: What happens after I submit the contact form?
faqs.answer: A GrowWise team member will reach out to schedule your child's free assessment. The assessment identifies your child's current level and which program fits — Math or English academic support, a STEAM program, or a summer camp.
